overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character carrying a large cargo backpack walking through a rocky mountain valley. The character progresses steadily along a winding path toward a blue holographic waypoint marker, traversing terrain that transitions from dark grassy soil to light rocky and sandy ground under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley trail with grassy patches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the valley carrying a large cargo load, heading toward the blue holographic marker

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation forming the valley wall
dark soil trail with scattered grass and small rocks
glowing blue waypoint beacon floating above the terrain
faint silhouettes of buildings or structures on the far horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dark grassy path through a narrow mountain valley. A massive rocky cliff rises on the left while the valley opens to the right. In the distance, a blue holographic waypoint marker glows above the terrain, guiding the path forward.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy dirt to mixed rocky terrain with larger stones

agents.ego_description: continuing through the valley as the path becomes rockier and more uneven

entered.detail: tall metal utility structure visible on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a rockier gravel surface as the character progresses deeper into the valley. The blue holographic marker draws closer, and a power line tower becomes visible on the right horizon. The left cliff face looms nearer as the path narrows.

events.description: terrain shifts to lighter sandy and rocky ground as approaching the waypoint destination

agents.ego_description: approaching the blue holographic marker across light-colored sandy and rocky terrain

segments.scene_description: The ground becomes significantly lighter, shifting to sandy and pale rocky terrain. The blue holographic waypoint marker is now much closer, floating prominently ahead. The power line tower on the right is more defined, and the valley opens slightly as the character nears the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain valley that transforms from a dark, grassy corridor into a pale, sandy expanse. It begins with the character walking along a dark grassy path beneath a massive rocky cliff, guided by a glowing blue holographic waypoint marker in the distance. As the character progresses deeper into the valley, the terrain shifts to a rockier gravel surface and the left cliff face looms nearer while a power line tower emerges on the right horizon. The scene then opens slightly as the ground becomes significantly lighter, transitioning into sandy and pale rocky terrain. Finally, the camera draws closer to the prominently floating waypoint marker and the now well-defined power line tower as the character nears the destination.
